gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/120)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/120)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَنْشَأَ يَقُولُ ابْتِدَاءً مِنْهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ أَسْأَلَهُ نَحْنُ حُجَّةُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ بَابُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ لِسَانُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ وَجْهُ اللَّهِ وَ نَحْنُ عَيْنُ اللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ وَ نَحْنُ وُلَاةُ أَمْرِ اللَّهِ فِي عِبَادِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Muhammad Bin Humran, from Aswad Bin Saeed who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> initiated saying from without having been questioned: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> are the Proof<sup>asws</sup> of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and we<sup>asws</sup> are the Door of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and we<sup>asws</sup> are the tongue of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and we<sup>asws</sup> are the Face of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and we<sup>asws</sup> are the eye of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> among His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures, and we<sup>asws</sup> are the Masters of the Command of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> among His<sup>azwj</sup> servants’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr from Muhammad ibn Humran from Aswad ibn Sa‘id who has said the following. “I was in the presence of Imam abu Ja‘far (a.s.), who began to speak without any question from me.” “We are the authority of Allah. We are the door to Allah. We are the tongue of Allah. We are the face of Allah. We are the eyes of Allah in His people. We are the authority in the commandments of Allah among His servants.”
